reviews.comment:
Yo cargo nafta en esta YPF y de todas las que fui es la unica que al ver que soy socio de serviclub me ofrecen los servicio gratuitos correspondiente.

(Translated by Google)
I fill up my tank at this YPF station, and of all the ones I've been to, it's the only one that, upon seeing that I'm a Serviclub member, offers me the corresponding free services.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNnFIM1dBEAE

reviews.comment:
Poca predisposición de los playeros, a primera hora de la mañana, para atender a los clientes como debería ser, el resto normal para una estación de servicios

(Translated by Google)
The attendants were not very willing to serve customers properly early in the morning; otherwise, everything was normal for a service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcm9TaUFREAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio normal. Cargué nafta un par de veces y no es para quejarse. El autoservicio es muy simple y el café es horrible.

(Translated by Google)
It's a standard gas station. I've filled up a couple of times and it's nothing to complain about. The self-service is very basic and the coffee is awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeVpXaHp3RRAB
